title: Floating Vaulting Updraft commit window: substrate/practice chunks
body: Opened git:index/head claim DE25B6D0-8C4C-4D53-B4F4-9BC54C4D4AC9 to commit current substrate, practice, and collaboration-state changes in sensible chunks, then merge origin/main and run tight session handoff. Active peer claims list was empty; commit-queue status had no active entries.
